summary: Iteration 55: AI Cinematic Visuals and VR Story Theater features tested. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend: All AI visual generation buttons verified across Creation Stories (watch-cinema-btn, cinematic-mode), VR (vr-theater-btn, vr-theater-picker), Forecasts (gen-visual), Cosmic Profile (gen-portrait-btn), Daily Briefing (gen-daily-card), and Dreams (gen-dream-visual).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 55 complete. New AI visual generation features verified: (1) Creation Stories cinematic mode with watch-cinema-btn opens fullscreen cinematic-mode overlay with scene slideshow and TTS narration sync. (2) VR Story Theater with vr-theater-btn shows vr-theater-picker dropdown with 6 creation stories (Mayan, Egyptian, Aboriginal Australian, Lakota Sioux, Hindu, Norse). (3) Forecasts page has gen-visual button in expanded forecast cards. (4) Cosmic Profile has gen-portrait-btn for AI cosmic portrait. (5) Daily Briefing has gen-daily-card for AI card of the day. (6) Dreams has gen-dream-visual after AI interpretation. All backend endpoints working: POST /api/ai-visuals/story-scenes/{story_id} (returns 3 scenes with total_scenes), POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-scene (generates single scene image), POST /api/ai-visuals/meditation, POST /api/ai-visuals/forecast, POST /api/ai-visuals/dream, POST /api/ai-visuals/cosmic-portrait, POST /api/ai-visuals/daily-card. Image generation uses GPT Image 1 via Emergent LLM Key with MongoDB caching in ai_visuals_cache collection.
